feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)

entry.title: A night in Gotham
entry.summary:
Author: Coffeecuppp

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,426Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 6

Summary: You never wanted to kill him, maybe you did, you don’t quite remember, everything is blurry from that night, you remember being scared, and sad but most of all you remember being angry, like never before. That was the night everything changed for you.You struck bad luck.

entry.title: Oil Stained Marginalia
entry.summary:
Author: laymorphosis

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,448Chapters: 1/20Kudos: 6

Summary: Jason Todd owns the mechanic shop down the street from a sleepy used bookstore that almost never sees a customer; which means the girl behind the counter has more than enough time on her hands to reorganize shelves, read and reread donated books too battered to put on the shelves, drink way too much coffee, and pretend she isn't watching the broad-shouldered mechanic who keeps making new excuses to come in during his lunch breaks.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 141,100Chapters: 29/?Kudos: 832

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"

entry.title: Code Red
entry.summary:
Author: Maybe_Here

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,967Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 333

Summary: Flatmates can be a real gamble. Sometimes they're normal. Sometimes they wear masks and wield guns. You move to Gotham to start at a new job at the General Hospital, but with limited options you have to move into a sketchy apartment.

entry.title: Good Luck, Babe!
entry.summary:
Author: VenusCrytrap

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 173,310Chapters: 33/?Kudos: 3,444

Summary: A decade after washing out of your mask, you try to piece together a decent life as Bruce Wayne's only civillian adoptee. Your father believes that you deserve more than what the manor has to offer. If only his wards got the memo.

entry.title: The Way You See Me
entry.summary:
Author: Xivkyn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,037Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 107

Summary: After being an experiment to Hugo Strange for the majority of your life you finally escape. The trauma of your time there follows you as you remember the screams and death all around you. You don't even know your own name as the number 'Seven' was the only semblance of a name you were given. You have no one to go home to and nothing you look forward to except for revenge. It consumes your every thought ever since you escaped. You want him to feel the pain he caused you and your friends.Limited y/n usage

entry.summary:
Author: midnights_blues

entry.title: Sympathy for the Lost
entry.summary:
Author: lllocalrynn

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,116Chapters: 2/12Kudos: 5

Summary: The Redhood takes Gotham's city by firestorm, cleaning up streets and controlling crime with efficiency, cruel for the wrong but a savior for the innocent. Batman knows who's under the helmet and knows he's coming for the laughing clown, meanwhile you find yourself caught up in a world of crime, and lies... all because you let a troubled guy with unhealed past, named Jason Todd lived in your building, and ultimately in your heart.

entry.title: Unlocked
entry.summary:
Author: Justcallme_po

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,075Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 5

Summary: In Gotham, leaving a door unlocked should be considered a mistake. For you, it became a ritual — one you waited for with equal parts fear and longing. Every Thursday, Jason Todd finds his way back to your apartment after patrol: bruised, exhausted, and carrying more wounds than he’s willing to admit. You both know how to survive. How to brace yourselves for the pain before it comes. How to live with loss. But after spending so long preparing yourselves to lose everything… Do either of you really know what it means to stay?

entry.title: The Bloom Knot
entry.summary:
Author: nocteris

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 56,293Chapters: 16/30Kudos: 185

Summary: Nineteen-year old reader accidentally matches with twenty-six year old Jason Peter Todd on his birthday— making them soulmates much to the chagrin of the Wayne Household. (Besides the fact that he was her professor come the first semester— a problem they didn’t know just yet.) The only logical thing to do was keep you at arm's length while finding a safe way to reverse the bond. But between late night motorcycle rides, concerts, and accidental library dates against your better judgement, suddenly the both of you weren’t so sure where the line between acquaintances ended and soulmates began.
